name: Birchwood Tennis & Pickleball Club
description: Birchwood Tennis & Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Birchwood, WI. There are 8 indoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water.
address: E Birch Ave and S Fuller St
hours: Sunday - Saturday: 8:00 AM - Close or last court reservation Location 105 Edella Road S. Abington Township, PA 18411 General: club@birchwoodtennis.com Tennis: tennis@birchwoodtennis.com Pickleball: pickleball@birchwoodtennis.com (570)586-4030 Contact Social

name: Jack Link's Aquatic & Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at Jack Link's Aquatic & Activity Center in Minong, WI! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Tip Town Park
description: Tip Town Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shell Lake, WI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: When Playing outside designated times Tennis Players have priority, Be Courteous. Share Courts.
